Prospective multi-tile benchmark matrix design

Pre-results artifact: this page contains no measurements, comparison, or recommendation, and creating it runs no benchmark.

Frozen identity

  • Project: synthetic-modern-atlas-blockwise
  • Created: 2026-07-22T16:56:47+00:00
  • Source config: minimal-modern-atlas-blockwise.yaml
  • Config SHA-256: 80484b95e4ed113752372df7e8597e9049c7e16133f3d8fd8b35ceb8e8b3472a
  • Available subject meshes: 5

Declared full-factorial protocol

  • Subject-prefix sizes: 1, 3, 5
  • Ordered query × source tile shapes: 32 × 32, 64 × 64, 128 × 128
  • Frozen cells: 9
  • Frozen conditions: 18 of at most 1000
  • Repeats per condition: 5
  • Warm-ups per repeat: 1
  • Order seed: 20260722
  • Reviewed source-config tiles: 64 × 64

Analysis policy

Preserve separate raw reports; do not automatically select a winner, calculate speedup or significance, choose a preset, or extrapolate to a full workflow or larger cohort.

Scientific boundary

This artifact freezes a full-factorial subject-prefix, tile-shape, and autograd-strategy benchmark design before results exist. It performs no benchmark, statistical analysis, peak-memory measurement, full-workflow measurement, safe-preset selection, scaling inference, or 300-subject feasibility test.

Machine-readable design: matrix-design.json. Integrity sidecar: matrix-design.sha256.
